title: PET-FM-Bench: Pre-Registered Cross-Foundation-Model Benchmark on Nuclear-Medicine Imaging Tasks with Systematic Contamination Audit — Analysis Code
description:
Reproducibility code for: Pretraining Domain Predicts Test–Retest Reproducibility of Foundation Models on PET: A Pre-Registered Nine-Task Benchmark with Contamination Audit (PET-FM-Bench).

Repository contents: Kaggle-runnable analysis notebooks (per-task preprocessing and embedding extraction; Phase 1 FM checkpoint manifest; Phase 2 contamination audit; Phase 4 patient-level splits; IBSI pyradiomics baseline via MIRP; 10-seed random-initialisation control; Phase 5 main probe pipeline at SEED = 42; A13 calibration per-prediction inference; manuscript figure rendering); local CPU-only scripts for Brier / calibration intercept and slope / ECE / IPCW-Cox calibration computation and eFigure 6 rendering; a Python source package (src/contamination, src/preprocess, src/probes); cohort acquisition guide; data dictionary for the public result and per-prediction parquets; and the four main manuscript figures plus eFigure 6 (PNG 300 dpi + vector PDF) regeneratable from the deposited public Kaggle datasets.

The benchmark was pre-registered on OSF on 2026-04-25 prior to any probe analysis. Thirteen methodological deviations / additions (A1–A13) were logged in the amendment log before each affected analysis was executed. Amendment A13 added a calibration sub-study following TRIPOD+AI Item 13 and CLAIM 2024 Item 26. Run-time pipeline SHA-256: 7ca32e8bb244845df6313de146d01ac8aaf7871cfcbccb2fdb61e62374227401 (probe_analysis.py v6, 2,960 lines). Amendment log v14 SHA-256: 3547f6745e4f2290ea23e954f99c946a41f8c43ac33f16226fe0ae55a54e237e. Changes from v1.0.0 to v1.1.0: added Amendment A13 calibration sub-study (binary tasks T1/T5/T7 and Cox tasks T3/T4); added notebooks/calibration_inference.py + calibration_inference_t4_fix.py (Kaggle); added scripts/compute_calibration.py + scripts/render_efigure_6.py (local CPU); added outputs/calibration/ with calibration_results.csv and per-decile parquets; added eFigure 6 to outputs/figures/; added 5 references to manuscript (PERCIST, Lugano, iPERCIST, FDA AI/ML SaMD, EU AI Act) and SNMMI clinical-translation framing.
